creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Reproducibility with FreeBSD (without TrueOS)
=============================================

https://github.com/trueos/trueos-core/issues/114#issuecomment-255430869

>> @MAHDTech Can you try one of the FreeBSD images to see 
>> if you have the same result?
>> 
>> ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/12.0/

https://github.com/trueos/trueos-core/issues/114#issuecomment-255568935

> … FreeBSD 12 snapshot, get the same issue (installs fine but won't boot) …
